title: AsukaFerrari
wikitext:
[]: AsukaFerrari             Quote Post by Pman » Thu Aug 19, 2010 6:36 pm LOLZ. Found at [url]http://kotaku.com/5616509/i-guess-this-is-a-bizarro-ferrari-trend[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Aug 19, 2010 6:43 pm Nice find; I'm somewhat surprised that no has thought of doing that before.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Aug 19, 2010 6:55 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: Nice find; I'm somewhat surprised that no has thought of doing that before.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Aug 19, 2010 7:13 pm I meant putting Asuka on a red sports car.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Thu Aug 19, 2010 7:29 pm There's something kind of cute about taking a "pussy-magnet" and then purposefully decorating it so that it repels women. I'm an otakuesque individual and Asuka's my favourite character, and this would make me wary of the driver. (I'd still be kind of curious, I'll be honest. But I'm also crazy to begin with.) For additional levels of humour: Asuka's a fourteen-year-old girl. But the shit Ornette-sama linked to ... way, way worse. Wow. That just makes me go totally dry between the legs.

[]: Asuka's a fourteen-year-old girl? NO WAI!             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Aug 19, 2010 7:53 pm oOoOoOo wrote: There's something kind of cute about taking a "pussy-magnet" and then purposefully decorating it so that it repels women. I'm an otakuesque individual and Asuka's my favourite character, and this would make me wary of the driver. (I'd still be kind of curious, I'll be honest. But I'm also crazy to begin with.) For additional levels of humour: Asuka's a fourteen-year-old girl.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Aug 19, 2010 7:58 pm Make it blue, and throw in Rei and Kaworu. Also, what Killer Bee said.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Thu Aug 19, 2010 9:07 pm TehDonutKing wrote: Make it blue, and throw in Rei and Kaworu. Also, what Killer Bee said.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Thu Aug 19, 2010 9:44 pm Kira Bee wrote: Who the fuck are you and what did you do with O-chan?

[]: Asuka + Sports Car + ??? = PROFIT!             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Aug 19, 2010 9:46 pm oOoOoOo wrote: This is tacky as fuck. Pictures of Asuka and a sports car do not go together. If this car were painted to resemble her Eva unit, that'd be a different story. I'd rub my glands all over that.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Thu Aug 19, 2010 9:49 pm A nocturnal emission is downright classy compared to the shit Ornette linked. We have to elevate our standards, here.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Thu Aug 19, 2010 9:54 pm So somebody added this to their car because they wanted to... ride Asuka? I'm sorry, if you're going to do it don't do it to a Ferrari or any car that's as ugly as that. And yes to O-Chan's comment, it might actually be likable if they had given the car some Unit 02 pictures.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Thu Aug 19, 2010 10:00 pm I prefer this one.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Thu Aug 19, 2010 10:06 pm NOW THAT IS HOT. THANK YOU. Licence plate is also hot. Fuck yeah~

[]:             Quote Post by Dirty Mick » Thu Aug 19, 2010 10:13 pm If you ain't first you're last, Second Child! oOoOoOo wrote: There's something kind of cute about taking a "pussy-magnet" and then purposefully decorating it so that it repels women.

[]: Photoshopped car is photoshopped.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Aug 19, 2010 10:32 pm Dirty Mick wrote: Whoah, that momobile is pretty wicked.

[]:             Quote Post by Zoop » Fri Aug 20, 2010 2:22 am I think you would be a real fanboy if you drive around in that crappy Renault of Misato's (including ducttape ofcourse!) I like the ferari a lot more than the screamy unit-01 corolla http://jonsibal.com/blog/2010/05/evangelion-corolla-supergt-round-3-results/

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Fri Aug 20, 2010 8:06 am On a scale of one to ten, how hot would I be if I drove an equally crappy Renault if it had white paint instead of blue? [I'll see if I have some pics] There's a distinct possibility that I could get my hands on a Renault in very similiar condition, and a similiar-looking model... I can't decide between buying that car or renting a Sony Red Camera.

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Fri Aug 20, 2010 9:02 am i can't see the first picture, but i can see the second one and i have to say i like the NERV ferrari. that's kinda awesome.
